atlas v0.9
返回网页家族 / Back To Families

网页家族 / Contemporary Web Family

瑞士排印网格型 Swiss Typographic Grid

以网格、排印和对齐关系组织信息的系统型页面，适合会持续生长的档案、参考库和知识站。

历史源头 / Historical Roots

瑞士风格 / Swiss Style

适配结构 / Structure Fit

目录索引型 / Catalog Explorer档案堆栈型 / Archive Stack

真实样本 / Sample Gallery

真实网站样本 / Live Website Samples

从真实站点看这条家族是怎样落地的。

借法 / Interpretation

借这条家族的语法，不只模仿表面 / Borrow the grammar, not only the surface

识别特征 / Signature

  • grid-first composition
  • hard alignment
  • labels and metadata matter
  • type as structure

可借语法 / Borrow

  • explicit alignment logic
  • consistent margins and modular spacing
  • clear category and metadata roles

适合内容 / Best For

  • archives
  • identity studios
  • reference libraries
  • design system sites

不适合时机 / Avoid When

  • the page needs emotional looseness
  • image mood matters more than taxonomy
  • the brand needs softness first

页面模式 / Page Patterns

这条家族常见会长成哪些页面组织 / The page patterns this family commonly becomes

页面模式 / Page Pattern

live

元数据网格索引型 Metadata Grid Index

The page behaves like an index: visible tags, stable card metadata, and strong typographic alignment do most of the organizing work.

识别信号 / Cues

grid-first listingmetadata as navigationstrong alignment

页面模式 / Page Pattern

live

证据模块堆栈型 Evidence Module Stack

The page alternates thesis, evidence, and navigation in labeled modules so density stays trustworthy.

识别信号 / Cues

section labelstopic blocksevidence-led content modules

历史源头 / Historical Roots

这类网页常从哪些历史流派长出来 / The earlier lineages behind this kind of site

1950s-1970s

Switzerland

瑞士风格 Swiss Style

如果你想做可扫描、可扩展、可归档的知识系统，Swiss 比“简单好看”更重要。

今天会在网页里变成 / Shows Up In

瑞士排印网格型 / Swiss Typographic Grid黑白工作室系统型 / Monochrome Studio Systems证据密集知识型 / Evidence-Dense Knowledge Surface
查看流派 / Open Movement

Prompt 风格包 / Prompt DNA

可以直接给 agent 的风格包 / A ready-to-use prompt packet

Prompt 风格包 / Prompt DNA

瑞士排印网格型 Swiss Typographic Grid

Use a Swiss typographic grid: modular alignment, visible metadata, tight typographic hierarchy, and structure carried by the grid rather than decoration.

参考链接 / Reference Packet

  • Studio Feixen
